CGAL::CatmullClark_mask_3.name: CGAL::CatmullClark_mask_3
CGAL::CatmullClark_mask_3.brief: The geometry mask of Catmull-Clark subdivision.
CGAL::CatmullClark_mask_3.detailed: A stencil determines a source neighborhood whose points contribute to the position of a refined point. The geometry mask of a stencil specifies the computation on the nodes of the stencil. CatmullClark_mask_3 implements the geometry masks of Catmull-Clark subdivision on models of MutableFaceGraph , such as Polyhedron_3 and Surface_mesh . PolygonMesh must be a model of the concept MutableFaceGraph . VertexPointMap must be a model of WritablePropertyMap with value type Point_3 Is model of PQQMask_3 CGAL::Subdivision_method_3

members.name: CatmullClark_mask_3
members.brief: Constructor.
members.detailed: The default vertex point property map, get(vertex_point, pmesh) , is used.

members.name: CatmullClark_mask_3
members.brief: Constructor with a custom vertex point property map.

members.name: edge_node
members.brief: computes the Catmull-Clark edge-point pt of the edge edge .

members.name: vertex_node
members.brief: computes the Catmull-Clark vertex-point pt of the vertex vertex .

members.name: border_node
members.brief: computes the Catmull-Clark edge-point ept and the Catmull-Clark vertex-point vpt of the border edge edge .

The geometry mask of a stencil specifies the computation on the nodes of the stencil. DooSabin_mask_3 implements the geometry masks of Doo-Sabin subdivision on models of MutableFaceGraph , such as Polyhedron_3 and Surface_mesh . PolygonMesh must be a model of the concept MutableFaceGraph . VertexPointMap must be a model of WritablePropertyMap with value type Point_3 Is model of DQQMask_3 CGAL::Subdivision_method_3

CGAL::Linear_mask_3.name: CGAL::Linear_mask_3

CGAL::Loop_mask_3.name: CGAL::Loop_mask_3
CGAL::Loop_mask_3.brief: The geometry mask of Loop subdivision.
CGAL::Loop_mask_3.detailed: A stencil determines a source neighborhood whose points contribute to the position of a refined point. The geometry mask of a stencil specifies the computation on the nodes of the stencil. Loop_mask_3 implements the geometry masks of Loop subdivision on a triangulated model of MutableFaceGraph , such as Polyhedron_3 and Surface_mesh . PolygonMesh must be a model of the concept MutableFaceGraph . Additionally all faces must be triangles. VertexPointMap must be a model of WritablePropertyMap with value type Point_3 Is model of PTQMask_3 CGAL::Subdivision_method_3

members.name: Loop_mask_3
members.brief: Constructor.
members.detailed: The default vertex point property map, get(vertex_point, pmesh) , is used.

members.name: Loop_mask_3
members.brief: Constructor with a custom vertex point property map.

members.name: edge_node
members.brief: computes the Loop edge-point pt of the edge edge .

members.name: vertex_node
members.brief: computes the Loop vertex-point pt of the vertex vertex .

members.name: border_node
members.brief: computes the Loop edge-point ept and the Loop vertex-point vpt of the border edge edge .

CGAL::Sqrt3_mask_3.name: CGAL::Sqrt3_mask_3
CGAL::Sqrt3_mask_3.brief: The geometry mask of Sqrt(3) subdivision.
CGAL::Sqrt3_mask_3.detailed: A stencil determines a source neighborhood whose points contribute to the position of a refined point. The geometry mask of a stencil specifies the computation on the nodes of the stencil. Sqrt3_mask_3 implements the geometry masks of $ \sqrt{3}$ subdivision on a triangulated model of MutableFaceGraph , such as Polyhedron_3 and Surface_mesh . PolygonMesh must be a model of the concept MutableFaceGraph . Additionally all faces must be triangles. VertexPointMap must be a model of WritablePropertyMap with value type Point_3 Is model of Sqrt3Mask_3 CGAL::Subdivision_method_3

members.name: Sqrt3_mask_3
members.brief: Constructor.
members.detailed: The default vertex point property map, get(vertex_point, pmesh) , is used.

members.name: Sqrt3_mask_3
members.brief: Constructor with a custom vertex point property map.

members.name: vertex_node
members.brief: computes the $ \sqrt{3}$ vertex-point pt of the vertex vd .

members.name: border_node
members.brief: computes the $ \sqrt{3}$ edge-points ept1 and ept2 of the halfedge hd .
members.detailed: The updated point coordinates for the target vertex of hd is also computed and put in vpt . Border subdivision only happens every second step of a single successive $ \sqrt{3}$ subdivision (thus requiring a depth larger than 1).

DQQMask_3.detailed: Refines SubdivisionMask_3 Has models CGAL::DooSabin_mask_3 < PolygonMesh , VertexPointMap> CGAL::Subdivision_method_3

PQQMask_3.detailed: Refines SubdivisionMask_3 Has models CGAL::CatmullClark_mask_3 < PolygonMesh , VertexPointMap> CGAL::Subdivision_method_3

members.name: PQQMask_3
members.brief: Constructor.

members.name: face_node
members.brief: computes the face-point pt based on the neighborhood of the face fd .

members.name: edge_node
members.brief: computes the edge-point pt based on the neighborhood of the edge hd .

members.name: vertex_node
members.brief: computes the vertex-point pt based on the neighborhood of the vertex vd .

members.name: border_node
members.brief: computes the edge-point ept and the vertex-point vpt based on the neighborhood of the border edge of hd .
members.detailed: hd is not a border halfedge (its opposite is) and vpt corresponds to the target vertex of hd .

Sqrt3Mask_3.name: Sqrt3Mask_3
Sqrt3Mask_3.brief: Required member functions for the Sqrt3Mask_3 concept. This policy concept of geometric computations is used in CGAL::Subdivision_method_3::Sqrt3 < PolygonMesh , Mask, NamedParameters> .

members.brief: Constructor.
members.detailed: The default vertex point property map is used.

members.name: Sqrt3Mask_3
members.brief: Constructor.

members.name: face_node
members.brief: computes the subdivided point pt based on the neighborhood of the face fd .

members.name: vertex_node
members.brief: computes the subdivided point pt based on the neighborhood of the vertex vd .

members.name: border_node
members.brief: computes the subdivided points ept1 and ept2 based on the neighborhood of the halfedge hd (whose opposite is on the border).
members.detailed: Along hd , ept1 comes before ept2 . vpt is the updated point for the target vertex of hd .
